description_long: This is a modern Audi SUV finished in a sleek gray color, featuring a streamlined body with four passenger doors and a panoramic sunroof. The front grille is adorned with the iconic Audi rings, flanked by sharp, angular LED headlights. The side profile reveals alloy wheels, flush door handles, and subtle character lines running along the doors. The rear showcases wraparound taillights, a rear windshield wiper, and a subtle roof spoiler. The windows are tinted, and the mirrors are body-colored with integrated turn signals. The overall design is both sporty and practical, suitable for urban and suburban environments.
description: A gray Audi SUV with four doors, LED headlights, alloy wheels, and a panoramic sunroof, featuring a sporty yet practical design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Audi grille, angular LED headlights, and panoramic sunroof.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting four doors, alloy wheels, and the elongated body shape.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying wraparound taillights, Audi badge, and rear windshield wiper.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing door arrangement and alloy wheels.
attribute_headlight_design: Dual angular LED headlights with integrated LED strips
